steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Translate the percentages: $a = 18.9(b + c)$ and $b = 0.75c$, so $c = \frac{b}{0.75}$. Substitute into the first equation: $$a = 18.9\!\left(b + \frac{b}{0.75}\right) = 18.9b\!\left(\frac{1.75}{0.75}\right)$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Simplify the fraction: $\frac{1.75}{0.75} = \frac{175}{75} = \frac{7}{3}$. Then: $$a = 18.9 \times \frac{7}{3} \times b = 44.1b$$ So $a$ is $44.1 \times 100\% = 4{,}410\%$ of $b$.
